# Cursor

> AI Registry entry [AIR-17](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-17/cursor) — status **Monitor** as of 2026-04-06. Departments: —.

**Category:** AI-Powered Software Development / IDE
**Cost:** Free Hobby; $20 Pro; $40 Business/seat
**Departments:** Technology

## Overview

AI-native code editor built as [[vs-code|VS Code]] fork. Deep AI integration for code generation, editing, understanding. Uses multiple LLMs ([[claude|Claude]], GPT-4) for intelligent completion, multi-file editing, codebase-aware chat. Leading AI-first IDE 2024-2025. Competes with GitHub Copilot and [[claude-code|Claude Code]] + VS Code combination.

## Capabilities

* AI-native — built directly into editing experience
* Tab completion — context-aware multi-line
* **Composer** — multi-file AI editing
* Chat with codebase
* Cmd+K inline editing
* Multi-model support (user-configurable)
* @ references for files/functions/docs
* Privacy mode — prevent code storage
* VS Code compatibility (extensions, themes, keybindings)

## Security

* SOC 2 Type II
* Privacy mode — no remote code storage
* Custom API keys (route through trusted providers)
* Business plan: centralised billing, team management

## Considerations

* $20-40/seat vs free VS Code + existing API keys
* Overlaps with VS Code + Claude Code workflow
* VS Code fork — potential compatibility lag with upstream
* Cursor's AI features may converge with VS Code native AI over time
* Team proficient with Claude Code — switching friction for uncertain benefit
* Privacy mode should be enabled if trialled

*Monitor. Functional tier. Tracking for competitive awareness only.*
